# Step 3 — Create PR from Template

> An alternative to the Blank PR creation path. The Creator selects a saved template which pre-populates the Workflow type, item locations, and products into a new Draft form. Quantities must still be entered manually.

![Template Selection Modal](data:image/png;base64,)

---

## 3.1 Access Path

1. PR List → **Add Request** → **PR Template**
2. A modal opens listing all available templates
3. Click a template row → form opens at `/procurement/purchase-request/new?template_id=:uuid`

No separate confirm button — a single click on a template row navigates immediately to the pre-filled form.

---

## 3.1a Purpose & Use Cases

| Scenario | Purpose | Use Case |
|----------|---------|----------|
| **Repeat order** | Re-order the same products as a previous standard request | Use when items, locations, and products are the same each time — avoids re-entering every line item manually |
| **Standing order** | Raise a PR for a fixed recurring set of items (e.g. weekly market list) | Use the same template each cycle; only quantities need updating before submission |
| **Fast draft** | Pre-fill a new PR quickly and review before submitting | Use when you know the general items needed but want to confirm quantities and delivery dates before sending for approval |

---

## 3.2 Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    list["1. PR List"] --> create["2. Create PR"]
    list --> tmpl["3. Create from Template"]
    create --> detail["4. PR Detail"]
    tmpl --> detail
    detail -->|Edit| edit["5. Edit PR"]
    edit --> submit["6. Submit Confirmation"]
    submit --> inprog(["Submitted - In Progress"])
    inprog -->|Returned| returned["7. Returned PR"]
    returned --> edit
    detail -->|Delete| del["8. Delete Confirmation"]
    del --> list
    style tmpl fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 3.3 Template Selection Modal

![Template Modal — Select](data:image/png;base64,)

| Element | Content |
|---------|---------|
| Title | **Select Template** |
| Subtitle | "Choose a template to prefill your purchase request." |
| Search input | Text field — filters the template list by name as user types |
| Template list | Scrollable list of saved templates |
| **Close** button | Dismisses modal; returns to PR List |

### Template List Row Format

Each row in the template list shows:

| Element | Example |
|---------|---------|
| PR Type badge | `Asset` / `General` / `Market List` |
| Template name | ครัวชัยนาท |
| Item count | `2 item(s)` |
| Item preview (inline) | Product code + name + quantity + unit |

Example row content observed:
```
Asset  ครัวชัยนาท  2 item(s)
  11140012  Dried Roselle 1 kg – 2641225  22 KG
  44070011  LG 24000 BTU (QJ407PD24A)  3 PCS
```


---

## 3.4 Pre-filled Create Form

![Template Form — Loaded](data:image/png;base64,)
![Template Form — With Items](data:image/png;base64,)

On template selection the form opens at `/new?template_id=:uuid` with:

### Header Fields (pre-filled)

| Field | Description | Pre-filled | Editable |
|-------|-------------|-----------|---------|
| **PR No.** | Auto-generated reference number — assigned on first save with items | Blank | No |
| **Date** | PR creation date — set automatically when the form was opened | Today's date | No |
| **Requestor** | Full name of the Creator raising this PR | Logged-in user | No |
| **Department** | The Creator's department — used for budget tracking | User's department | No |
| **Workflow** (PR Type) | Determines the approval chain (General / Asset / Market List) | From template | Yes |
| **Description** | Brief explanation of the PR purpose — visible to all approvers | Blank | Yes |

### Items Grid (pre-filled)

| Column | Description | Pre-filled from Template | Creator Must Fill |
|--------|-------------|--------------------------|-------------------|
| **Location** | Where the item will be used or stored within the property | ✅ Yes — from template | — |
| **Product** | The item being requested — from the inventory master | ✅ Yes — from template | — |
| **Requested (Qty)** | Number of units needed — template defaults to 1; always review before submitting | Partially — qty = 1 | Adjust to actual quantity needed |
| **Amount** | Total cost = Qty × Unit Price — auto-calculated; shows 0.00 if no unit price exists | Auto-calculated | — |
| **Currency** | Transaction currency — defaults to the property's base currency | Defaults to THB | Override if needed |
| **Delivery Point** | Specific delivery destination within the property | ✅ Yes — from template (if set) | — |
| **Delivery Date** | Date the item is needed by — must not be in the past | Not pre-filled | Optional |
| **Comment** | Any additional notes for this line item — visible to purchasers and approvers | Not pre-filled | Optional |

> **Note:** Qty defaults to 1 from the template but should be reviewed and adjusted before saving. Amount shows 0.00 if the product has no unit price in the system — this is a pricing data gap, not a template issue.

The Creator can:
- Edit any pre-filled field
- Delete any pre-filled item row (×)
- Add additional item rows via **Add Item**

---

## 3.5 Action Buttons, Behaviour & Validation

Same button set as the Blank PR Create form. See §2.6 of [step-02-create-pr.md](step-02-create-pr.md) for full pattern detail.

> **Form states:**
> - **New** (URL: `/purchase-request/new?template_id=:uuid`) — before first save with items
> - **Draft saved** (URL: `/purchase-request/:uuid`) — after first save with ≥ 1 item

### Button Summary

| Button | Color | Available: New state | Available: Draft saved | Purpose / Use Case |
|--------|-------|---------------------|------------------------|--------------------|
| **Cancel** | Outline/Grey | ✅ Always | ✅ Always | Return to PR List without saving — use when you no longer need this PR |
| **Save** | Secondary | ✅ Always | ✅ Always | Save the template-filled form as Draft so you can review quantities and submit later |
| **Submit** | Blue/Primary | Only when ≥ 1 item + Workflow selected | Only when ≥ 1 item + Workflow selected | Send the completed PR for approval — triggers workflow routing |
| **Delete** | Red/Danger | ❌ Not available | ✅ After first save | Permanently remove a Draft PR that is no longer needed |

---

### On Cancel

**Purpose / Use Case:** Return to the PR List, discarding the pre-filled template form without creating a PR.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | Unsaved changes are present | BR-14 | **Expected:** "Discard changes?" dialog | **Observed:** Returns to PR List immediately — no warning (TBC on template form) |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy (BR-14):** BRD FR-PR-011 requires a warning when navigating away with unsaved changes. Not confirmed on the template form.

---

### On Save

**Purpose / Use Case:** Save the template-based PR as a Draft. Use to lock in the pre-filled items and review quantities before submitting.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | At least 1 item row with Location and Product filled | FR-PR-002 | URL changes to `/:uuid`; Delete button becomes available | URL stays at `/new?template_id=...`; header saved only |
| 2 | Qty is more than 0 (per row) | BR-06 | Item saved | Row-level error shown on Qty field |
| 3 | Workflow (PR Type) is selected | BR-04 | Proceeds | Save allowed; Submit remains disabled until Workflow selected |

---

### On Submit

**Purpose / Use Case:** Send the template-based PR for approval after quantities and details are confirmed. Cannot be undone.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | Workflow (PR Type) is selected | BR-04 | Submit button is active | Button is disabled |
| 2 | At least 1 item row is present | BR-05 | Submit button is active | Button is disabled |
| 3 | Location is not empty on all rows | FR-PR-002 | Proceeds to confirmation dialog | Row-level error shown on Location field |
| 4 | Product is not empty on all rows | FR-PR-002 | Proceeds to confirmation dialog | Row-level error shown on Product field |
| 5 | Qty is more than 0 on all rows | FR-PR-002 | Proceeds to confirmation dialog | Row-level error shown on Qty field |
| 6 | Budget is not exceeded | BR-18 | Soft commitment created; status → INPROGRESS | Warning shown or blocked depending on org config |
| 7 | PR status is still DRAFT at submit time | FR-PR-006 | Status → INPROGRESS | Server rejects if concurrent state change |

---

### On Delete

**Purpose / Use Case:** Permanently remove a Draft PR that is no longer needed. Only available after first save.

| # | Check | BR | Pass — what happens | Fail — what happens |
|---|-------|----|---------------------|---------------------|
| 1 | PR status is DRAFT | FR-PR-006 | "Confirm delete?" dialog shown | Delete button not available |
| 2 | User confirms deletion | BR-14 | PR permanently deleted; redirected to PR List | PR kept; dialog closed |

---

## 3.6 Business Rules

| # | Rule | Source |
|---|------|--------|
| BR-01 | Templates are shared across users of the same property. Any Creator can use any available template. | FR-PR-001 |
| BR-02 | Selecting a template creates a **new Draft PR** — the template itself is not modified or consumed. | FR-PR-001 |
| BR-03 | Template pre-populates: PR Type, item Location, Product, and default Qty (1). Description is NOT copied from template. | FR-PR-001 |
| BR-04 | The Creator must set actual quantities before submitting. Template qty defaults are placeholders only. | FR-PR-002 |
| BR-05 | PR Number is not assigned until the first save with valid items. The URL remains `/new?template_id=:uuid` until then. | FR-PR-001 |
| BR-06 | All items and validations from the Blank PR flow apply equally to Template PRs. | FR-PR-002 |
| BR-07 | Templates are managed separately by authorised users (not by the Creator). Creator can only select, not create or edit templates. | FR-PR-001 |

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy (BR-03):** The template list modal shows quantities (e.g. "22 KG") but the form loads with qty = 1 as default. The modal-displayed quantities appear to be from the template definition, not applied to the new PR.

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy (BR-07):** No template management UI was observed in the Creator view. Template creation/editing is presumably an admin function — not confirmed in scope.

---

## 3.7 Edge Cases & Error States

| # | Scenario | System Behaviour |
|---|----------|-----------------|
| 1 | No templates exist in the system | Template list modal shows empty state (TBC — behaviour not confirmed) |
| 2 | Template product no longer exists in inventory | Item row pre-filled with product code but product may be stale — validation on Save TBC |
| 3 | Template location no longer valid for user's property | Location pre-filled but may fail validation — TBC |
| 4 | Cancel clicked after template loaded but before any edits | Returns to PR List; no PR created |
| 5 | Creator adds more items to a template PR | Allowed — template rows plus new blank rows coexist |
| 6 | Creator deletes all template items then saves | Header-only save; URL stays at `/new?template_id=...`; Submit remains disabled |

---

## 3.8 Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|-------------|
| **Cancel** | Step 1 — PR List |
| **Save** (with valid items) | Step 4 — PR Detail (Draft) at `/:uuid` |
| **Submit** → Confirm | Step 4 — PR Detail (INPROGRESS, read-only) |
| Close template modal | Step 1 — PR List |
| Breadcrumb **Purchase Request** | Step 1 — PR List |
